{{Quote|We came to quell a prison riot, not execute the prisoners.|[[Kit Fisto/Legends|Kit Fisto]], to [[Plo Koon/Legends|Plo Koon]]|<ref name="Means and Ends" />}}
The '''M'Bardi Prison''' was located on [[M'Bardi]], a [[Planet/Legends|world]] consisting prominently of [[Water/Legends|water]], located in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]]. During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], a [[Riot at the M'Bardi Prison|riot]] was staged in the [[Prison/Legends|prison]] by the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Durge/Legends|Durge]].<ref name="Means and Ends" />
